TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_DeAndre'_Bembry, title = DeAndre'_Bembry, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/DeAndre'_Bembry} }

S.FORM: DeAndre' Bembry hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas te 1994, byacing te 7 ru 4 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga North Carolina, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 198 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 95 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2016 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Atlanta Hawks. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players gocyu trang gocyu mqwas biru beh Rocky River High School . wal mqwas beh mzyu mari na St. Patrick High School . pspung mzyu mari magan 21.8 ru qeru mari qlcing.

DeAndre' Bembry hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas te 1994, byacing te 7 ru 4 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga North Carolina, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 198 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 95 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2016 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Atlanta Hawks. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players gocyu trang gocyu mqwas biru beh Rocky River High School . wal mqwas beh mzyu mari na St. Patrick High School . pspung mzyu mari magan 21.8 ru qeru mari qlcing.
S.PHON: *ean*reʔ βemβrj ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw / praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru * rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa nortħ ʦ~ʨarolina, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu atlanta ħawks~ɕ. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ ɣoʦ~ʨju traŋ ɣoʦ~ʨju mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ roʦ~ʨkj ri*er ħiɣħ s~ɕʦ~ʨħool . wal mqwas~ɕ βeħ mzju mari na s~ɕt. patriʦ~ʨk ħiɣħ s~ɕʦ~ʨħool . ps~ɕpuŋ mzju mari maɣan **.* ru qeru mari qlʦ~ʨiŋ.
